headline: ServiceNow AI Control Tower Ambitions Test Post SaaSpocalypse Narrative
summary: ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) is expanding its role in enterprise AI through multi-year partnerships with companies including Experian and Wipro. The company is integrating its platform with providers such as Snowflake and Dell to act as an AI control layer across corporate data and workflows. Recent acquisitions are focused on AI and cybersecurity capabilities, aiming to deepen ServiceNow's position inside large enterprise tech stacks. ServiceNow, best known for workflow automation and IT service...
